Complete List of SQL Text

SQL IdSQL Text
01ncdk23uqcksselect 'jobs_running' stat_type, count(*) v1, null v2, null v3, null v4 from ( SELECT j.job_name, j.owner, j.state FROM cdb_scheduler_jobs j WHERE j.job_subname IS NULL AND (j.state = 'RUNNING' OR j.state = 'CHAIN_STALLED')) UNION ALL select 'jobs_failed', count(*) v1, null v2, null v3, null v4 from ( SELECT all_runs.JOB_NAME, all_runs.OWNER, all_runs.STATUS FROM CDB_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS all_runs, (SELECT CON_ID, JOB_NAME, OWNER, MAX(ACTUAL_START_DATE) AS START_DATE FROM CDB_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS GROUP BY CON_ID, JOB_NAME, OWNER) latest_runs WHERE latest_runs.CON_ID =all_runs.CON_ID AND latest_runs.OWNER=all_runs.OWNER AND latest_runs.JOB_NAME=all_runs.JOB_NAME AND all_runs.ACTUAL_START_ DATE= latest_runs.START_DATE AND all_runs.STATUS = 'FAILED')
03guhbfpak0w7select /*+ index(idl_ub1$ i_idl_ub11) */ piece#, length, piece from idl_ub1$ where obj#=:1 and part=:2 and version=:3 order by piece#
04kug40zbu4dmselect policy#, action# from aud_object_opt$ where object# = :1 and type = 2
09mgsjsatycjhSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2014-3' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
0b639nx4zdzxrselect domain# from sys.im_domain$ where objn = :1 and col# = :2
0h0pghbj7g4mvSELECT t.time_id, to_char(SUM(amount_sold), '9, 999, 999, 999') AS sales, to_char(AVG(SUM(amount_sold)) over(ORDER BY t.time_id range BETWEEN INTERVAL '2' DAY preceding AND INTERVAL '2' DAY following), '9, 999, 999, 999') AS centered_5_day_avg FROM sales s, times t WHERE t.calendar_month_desc IN('1998-04', '1998-05', '1998-06', '1998-07') AND s.time_id = t.time_id GROUP BY t.time_id ORDER BY t.time_id
0hfxmftg5rastDECLARE job BINARY_INTEGER := :job; next_date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :mydate; broken BOOLEAN := FALSE; job_name VARCHAR2(128) := :job_name; job_subname VARCHAR2(128) := :job_subname; job_owner VARCHAR2(128) := :job_owner; job_start TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :job_start; job_scheduled_start TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :job_scheduled_start; window_start TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :window_start; window_end TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :window_end; chain_id VARCHAR2(14) := :chainid; credential_owner VARCHAR2(128) := :credown; credential_name VARCHAR2(128) := :crednam; destination_owner VARCHAR2(128) := :destown; destination_name VARCHAR2(128) := :destnam; job_dest_id varchar2(14) := :jdestid; log_id number := :log_id; BEGIN DECLARE my_cid NUMBER := 82; cur_cid NUMBER; BEGI N SELECT max(c.id) INTO cur_cid FROM DBA_WORKLOAD_CAPTURES c WHERE status = 'IN PROGRESS'; IF (cur_cid = my_cid) THEN BEGIN DBMS_WORKLOAD_CAPTURE.FINISH_CAPTURE(); EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN NULL; END; END IF; END; :mydate := next_date; IF broken THEN :b := 1; ELSE :b := 0; END IF; END;
0k8522rmdzg4kselect privilege# from sysauth$ where (grantee#=:1 or grantee#=1) and privilege#>0
0mgmh9gt4gjgqSELECT (TRUNC((CAST(MIN(SAMPLE_TIME) AS DATE) - :B2 ) * 86400 / :B1 ) * :B1 / 86400) + :B2 AS SLOT_TIME, IS_REPLAYED, COUNT(*) * 10 / :B1 AS REPLAYED FROM DBA_HIST_ACTIVE_SESS_HISTORY WHERE :B10 = 1 AND DBID = :B6 AND SNAP_ID >= :B9 AND (:B8 IS NULL OR SNAP_ID <= :B8 ) AND (:B7 <> :B6 OR (SNAP_ID <= (SELECT MAX(SNAP_ID) FROM DBA_HIST_SNAPSHOT WHERE BEGIN_INTERVAL_TIME < (SELECT MIN(SAMPLE_TIME) FROM GV$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY))) AND FROM_TZ(CAST(SAMPLE_TIME AS TIMESTAMP), :B4 ) >= :B5 AND FROM_TZ(CAST(SAMPLE_TIME AS TIMESTAMP), :B4 ) <= :B3 ) GROUP BY TRUNC((CAST(SAMPLE_TIME AS DATE) - :B2 ) * 86400 / :B1 ), IS_REPLAYED UNION SELECT (TRUNC((CAST(MIN(SAMPLE_TIME) AS DATE) - :B2 ) * 86400 / :B1 ) * :B1 / 86400) + :B2 AS SLOT_TIME, IS_REPLAYED, COUNT(*) / :B1 AS REPLAYED FROM GV$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY WHERE (:B7 = :B6 OR :B7 I N (SELECT DBID FROM GV$DATABASE)) AND FROM_TZ(CAST(SAMPLE_TIME AS TIMESTAMP), :B4 ) >= :B5 AND FROM_TZ(CAST(SAMPLE_TIME AS TIMESTAMP), :B4 ) <= :B3 GROUP BY TRUNC((CAST(SAMPLE_TIME AS DATE) - :B2 ) * 86400 / :B1 ), IS_REPLAYED ORDER BY SLOT_TIME DESC
0nakmm882vmq0select /* QOSH:DROP_STAT_HIST_PARTS */ partition_name, high_value from (select partition_name, high_value, rownum rn from (select PARTITION_NAME, HIGH_VALUE from dba_tab_partitions where table_name = :1 and table_owner = 'SYS' and partition_name <> 'P_PERMANENT' order by partition_position asc)) v where rn < :2
0w26sk6t6gq98SELECT XMLTYPE(DBMS_REPORT.GET_REPORT_WITH_SUMMARY(:B1 )) FROM DUAL
121ffmrc95v7gselect i.obj#, i.ts#, i.file#, i.block#, i.intcols, i.type#, i.flags, i.property, i.pctfree$, i.initrans, i.maxtrans, i.blevel, i.leafcnt, i.distkey, i.lblkkey, i.dblkkey, i.clufac, i.cols, i.analyzetime, i.samplesize, i.dataobj#, nvl(i.degree, 1), nvl(i.instances, 1), i.rowcnt, mod(i.pctthres$, 256), i.indmethod#, i.trunccnt, nvl(c.unicols, 0), nvl(c.deferrable#+c.valid#, 0), nvl(i.spare1, i.intcols), i.spare4, i.spare2, i.spare6, decode(i.pctthres$, null, null, mod(trunc(i.pctthres$/256), 256)), nvl(i.evaledition#, 1), nvl(i.unusablebefore#, 0), nvl(i.unusablebeginning#, 0), ist.cachedblk, ist.cachehit, ist.logicalread from ind$ i, ind_stats$ ist, (select enabled, min(intcols) unicols, min(to_number(bitand(defer, 1))) deferrable#, min(to_number(bitand(defer, 4))) valid# from cdef$ where obj#=:1 and enabled > 1 group by enabled) c where i.obj# =c.enabled(+) and i.obj# = ist.obj#(+) and i.bo#=:1 order by i.obj#
131gsdm5thxabSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '1998-1' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
1cyrdca6aa37qSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2020-1' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
1gfaj4z5hn1kfdelete from dependency$ where d_obj#=:1
1kj22kmw7u7g5select spare3 from sensitive_fixed$ where name=:1 and flag=:2
1zm0sn3qcx0huSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2009-2' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
20kh458yq5jx7SELECT t.time_id, to_char(SUM(amount_sold), '9, 999, 999, 999') AS sales, to_char(AVG(SUM(amount_sold)) over(ORDER BY t.time_id range BETWEEN INTERVAL '2' DAY preceding AND INTERVAL '2' DAY following), '9, 999, 999, 999') AS centered_5_day_avg FROM sales s, times t WHERE t.calendar_month_desc IN('2017-10', '2017-11', '2017-12', '2018-01') AND s.time_id = t.time_id GROUP BY t.time_id ORDER BY t.time_id
20vv6ttajyjzqdelete from access$ where d_obj#=:1
221umhwyygb2jSELECT /*+ NO_STATEMENT_QUEUING RESULT_CACHE (SYSOBJ=TRUE SHELFLIFE=30) */ "JOB_SUBNAME", "STATE" FROM "SYS"."DBA_SCHEDULER_JOBS" "K" WHERE "K"."JOB_SUBNAME" IS NULL AND ("K"."STATE"='CHAIN_STALLED' OR "K"."STATE"='RUNNING')
22kbagyq9q66gSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2000-3' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
23bdv7p1xf88sBEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('SalesMovingAverage', null); END;
23s96rf87635sselect count(*) from sys.col_group_usage$ where obj# = :1 and cols = :2 and trunc(sysdate) = trunc(timestamp) and bitand(flags, :3) = :3
26y5rfzy071zjSELECT /*+ NO_STATEMENT_QUEUING */ "USERNAME", "USER_ID" FROM "SYS"."DBA_USERS" "K" WHERE "K"."USER_ID"=:2
2p9fv35c7zxtgselect /* KSXM:LOAD_DML_INF *//*+ leading(o) index(m) use_nl(m) */ nvl(m.inserts, 0) ins, nvl(m.updates, 0) upd, nvl(m.deletes, 0) del, nvl(m.drop_segments, 0) dropseg, nvl(m.flags, 0) flags, nvl(rowcnt, 0) rowcnt, o.pobjn pobjn from (select :objn objn, 0 pobjn, rowcnt from tab$ t where t.obj# = :objn union all select :objn objn, tp.bo# pobjn, rowcnt from tabpart$ tp where tp.obj# = :objn union all select :objn objn, tcp.bo# pobjn, rowcnt from tabcompart$ tcp where tcp.obj# = :objn union all select :objn objn, tsp.pobj# pobjn, rowcnt from tabsubpart$ tsp where tsp.obj# = :objn) o, sys.mon_mods_all$ m where o.objn = m.obj#(+) and rownum < 2
2vbuum4mhkpxaselect count(*) from sys.col_group_usage$ where obj# = :1 and cols = :2 and trunc(sysdate) = trunc(timestamp) and bitand(flags, :3) = :3 and (:4 is null or cols_range like '%' || replace(:4, ', ' , '%') || '%')
2wrx8j13jq2daselect t.obj#, t.dataobj#, t.part#, t.hiboundlen, t.hiboundval, t.ts#, t.file#, t.block#, t.pctfree$, t.pctused$, t.initrans, t.maxtrans, t.flags, t.analyzetime, t.samplesize, t.rowcnt, t.blkcnt, t.empcnt, t.avgspc, t.chncnt, t.avgrln, length(t.bhiboundval), t.bhiboundval, ts.im_imcu_count, ts.im_block_count, ts.im_sys_incarnation, ts.im_stat_update_time, t.chunkid from tabpart$ t, tab_stats$ ts where t.bo# = :1 and t.obj# = ts.obj#(+) order by t.part#
370m5yqjjcr8zSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '1997-4' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
3dbzmtf9ahvztmerge /* KSXM:OPTIM_DML_INF */ into sys.mon_mods_all$ m using dual on (m.obj# = :objn and (:pobjn = 0 or m.obj# = :pobjn or m.obj# in (select obj# from tabpart$ where bo# = :pobjn and obj# = :objn union all select obj# from tabcompart$ where bo# = :pobjn and o bj# = :objn union all select tsp.obj# from tabsubpart$ tsp, tabcompart$ tcp where tsp.pobj# = tcp.obj# and (tcp.bo# = :pobjn or tcp.obj# = :pobjn) and tsp.obj# = :objn))) when matched then update set inserts = decode(:reset, 1, 0, inserts) + :ins, updates = decode(:reset, 1, 0, updates) + :upd, deletes = decode(:reset, 1, 0, deletes) + :del, flags = decode(:reset, 1, 0, flags - bitand(flags, :flag)) + :flag, drop_segments = decode(:reset, 1, 0, d rop_segments) + :dropseg, timestamp = :time when NOT matched then insert (obj#, inserts, updates, deletes, timestamp, flags, drop_segments) values (:objn, :ins, :upd, :del, :time, :flag, :dropseg) where :ins != 0 or :upd != 0 or :del != 0 or :flag != 0 or :dropseg !=0
3un99a0zwp4vdselect owner#, name, namespace, remoteowner, linkname, p_timestamp, p_obj#, nvl(property, 0), subname, type#, flags, d_attrs from dependency$ d, obj$ o where d_obj#=:1 and p_obj#=obj#(+) order by order#
4w4up0t88ccrySELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2002-4' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
5u7g54s63p4tsselect toid from type$ where package_obj#=:1 and typ_name=:2
61znfd8fvgha6SELECT new.sql_seq, old.plan_hash_value, sqlset_row(new.sql_id, new.force_matching_signature, new.sql_text, new.object_list, new.bind_data, new.parsing_schema_name, new.module, new.action, new.elapsed_time, new.cpu_time, new.buffer_gets, new.disk_reads, new.direct_writes, new.rows_processed, new.fetches, new.executions, new.end_of_fetch_count, new.optimizer_cost, new.optimizer_env, new.priority, new.command_type, new.first_load_time, new.stat_period, new.active_stat_period, new.other, new.plan_hash_value, new.sql_plan, new.bind_list, new.con_dbid, new.last_exec_start_time, new.sharable_mem, new.exact_matching_signature, new.result_cache_executions, new.sql_profile, new.sql_plan_baseline, new.sql_patch, new.avg_hard_parse_time, new.user_io_wait_time, new.io_interconnect_bytes, new.parsing_ user_name ) as new_row , old.plan_timestamp, old.binds_captured FROM (SELECT s.sql_seq, c.* FROM sys."_ALL_SQLSET_STATEMENTS_ONLY" s, TABLE(dbms_sqltune.transform_sqlset_cursor(:sts_cur)) c WHERE s.sqlset_id(+) = :stsid AND s.sql_id(+) = c.sql_id AND s.con_dbid(+) = c.con_dbid) new , sys."_ALL_SQLSET_STATISTICS_ONLY" old WHERE :stsid = old.sqlset_id(+) AND new.sql_seq = old.sql_seq(+) AND new.plan_hash_value = old.plan_hash_value(+) AND (( old.executions != new.executions or old.end_of_fetch_count != new.end_of_fetch_count or old.last_exec_start_time != new.last_exec_start_time ) OR old.sql_seq is NULL)
651zkd2an3shbSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2015-1' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
6n5rbcc9c9tvsSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2012-2' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
6nasnjdk9vct7SELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2015-4' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
6qz82dptj0qr7select l.col#, l.intcol#, l.lobj#, l.ind#, l.ts#, l.file#, l.block#, l.chunk, l.pctversion$, l.flags, l.property, l.retention, l.freepools from lob$ l where l.obj# = :1 order by l.intcol# asc
6sqcursfvj3b6SELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2019-4' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
6u54j4s3wf1ymSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2004-3' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
76gmd3v7vcx1qSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2019-3' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
772ank4p8pchaBEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('SalesRollupByWeek', null); END;
7p3m5a493ys3vBEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('SalesRollupByMonth', null); END;
8d5fgsqzt5004insert into WRH$_IOSTAT_FILETYPE (dbid, per_pdb, con_dbid, snap_id, instance_number, filetype_id, small_read_megabytes, small_write_megabytes, large_read_megabytes, large_write_megabytes, small_read_reqs, small_write_reqs, small_sync_read_reqs, large_read_reqs, large_write_reqs, small_read_servicetime, small_write_servicetime, small_sync_read_latency, large_read_servicetime, large_write_servicetime, retries_on_error ) select :dbid, if.con_id, con_id_to_dbid(if.con_id) con_dbid, :snap_id, :instance_number, filetype_id, sum(small_read_megabytes) small_read_megabytes, sum(small_write_megabytes) small_write_megabytes, sum(large_read_megabytes) large_read_megabytes, sum(large_write_megabytes) large_write_megabytes, sum(small_read_reqs) small_read_reqs, sum(small_write_reqs) small_write_reqs, sum(small_sync_read_reqs) small_sync_read_reqs, sum(large_read_reqs) large_read_reqs, sum(large_write_reqs) large_write_reqs, sum(small_read_servicetime) small_read_servicetime, sum(small_write_servicetime) small_write_servicetime, sum(small_sync_read_latency) small_sync_read_latency, sum(large_read_servicetime) large_read_servicetime, sum(large_write_servicetime) large_write_servicetime, sum(retries_on_error) retries_on_error FROM v$iostat_file if WHERE (1 = 1) AND ( if.con_id < 4099 ) GROUP BY if.con_id, filetype_id
8fkf44w2uz074select l.col#, l.intcol#, l.lobj#, l.ind#, l.ts#, l.file#, l.block#, l.chunk, l.pctversion$, l.flags, l.property, l.retention, l.freepools, l.maxinl from lob$ l where l.obj# = :1 order by l.intcol# asc
8gbt6t0s3jn0tMERGE /*+ OPT_PARAM('_parallel_syspls_obey_force' 'false') */ INTO OPTSTAT_USER_PREFS$ D USING ( SELECT * FROM (SELECT /*+ leading(u o et) */ O.OBJ#, SYSTIMESTAMP CHGTIME, ROUND(MAX(S.DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES/S.DELTA_TIME), 3) SCANRATE FROM GV$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY S, GV$SQL_PLAN P, OBJ$ O, USER$ U, SYS.EXTERNAL_TAB$ ET WHERE S.INST_ID = P.INST_ID AND S.SQL_ID = P.SQL_ID AND S.SQL_PLAN_HASH_VALUE = P.PLAN_HASH_VALUE AND S.SQL_PLAN_LINE_ID = P.ID AND P.OBJECT_NAME = O.NAME AND (:B4 IS NULL OR O.OBJ# = :B4 ) AND O.OWNER# = U.USER# AND P.OBJECT_OWNER = U.NAME AND O.TYPE# = 2 AND S.CON_ID = SYS_CONTEXT('userenv', 'con_id') AND P.CON_ID = SYS_CONTEXT('userenv', 'con_id') AND S.SQL_PLAN_OPERATION LIKE '%TABLE ACCESS' AND P.OPERATION LIKE '%TABLE ACCESS' AND S.SQL_PLAN_OPERATION = P.OPERATION AND S.DELTA_TIME > 0 AND S.DELTA_READ_IO_BYTES > 0 AND FR OM_TZ(S.SAMPLE_TIME, :B3 ) > :B2 AND ET.OBJ# (+) = O.OBJ# AND ET.TYPE$ (+) IN ('ORACLE_HIVE', 'ORACLE_HDFS', 'ORACLE_BIGDATA') AND (:B1 = 'ON' OR (:B1 = 'HADOOP_ONLY' AND ET.OBJ# IS NOT NULL)) GROUP BY O.OBJ#) C WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM OPTSTAT_USER_PREFS$ PR WHERE PNAME = 'SCAN_RATE' AND C.OBJ# = PR.OBJ# AND (PR.SPARE1 IS NULL OR C.SCANRATE <= TO_NUMBER(PR.VALCHAR))) ) SRC ON (D.OBJ#=SRC.OBJ# AND D.PNAME = 'SCAN_RATE') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET D.VALCHAR= TO_CHAR(SRC.SCANRATE), D.CHGTIME=SRC.CHGTIME, D.SPARE1=1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (OBJ#, PNAME, VALCHAR, CHGTIME, SPARE1) VALUES(SRC.OBJ#, 'SCAN_RATE', TO_CHAR(SRC.SCANRATE), SRC.CHGTIME, 1)
8k0bufga1duttSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2002-1' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
8swypbbr0m372select order#, columns, types from access$ where d_obj#=:1
954q4b1vkp8m4SELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2008-2' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
96uvdds9xf676BEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('SalesCubeByWeek', null); END;
9g485acn2n30mselect col#, intcol#, reftyp, stabid, expctoid from refcon$ where obj#=:1 order by intcol# asc
9jvjy0wx681rjDECLARE job BINARY_INTEGER := :job; next_date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :mydate; broken BOOLEAN := FALSE; job_name VARCHAR2(128) := :job_name; job_subname VARCHAR2(128) := :job_subname; job_owner VARCHAR2(128) := :job_owner; job_start TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :job_start; job_scheduled_start TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :job_scheduled_start; window_start TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :window_start; window_end TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE := :window_end; chain_id VARCHAR2(14) := :chainid; credential_owner VARCHAR2(128) := :credown; credential_name VARCHAR2(128) := :crednam; destination_owner VARCHAR2(128) := :destown; destination_name VARCHAR2(128) := :destnam; job_dest_id varchar2(14) := :jdestid; log_id number := :log_id; BEGIN DECLARE sts_name VARCHAR2(30) := 'sh_upgradetest_02_r_3415822'; sts_user dbms_quoted_id := 'SYS'; sts_description VARCHAR2(2000) := 'STS capture for replay with ID=34'; sts_cap_interval NUMBER := nvl(300, 300); BEGIN dbms_sqltune.capture_cursor_cache_sqlset( sqlset_name => sts_name, time_limit => 2629743, -- this is a month repeat_interval => sts_cap_interval, capture_option => 'MERGE', capture_mode => dbms_sqltune.MODE_REPLACE_OLD_STATS, basic_filter => 'parsing_schema_name not in (''SYS'', ''SYSTEM'')', sqlset_owner => sts_user, recursive_sql => dbms_sqltune.NO_RECURSIVE_SQL); END; :mydate := next_date; IF broken THEN :b := 1; ELSE :b := 0; END IF; END;
9nv5kd5nyr1bhSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2017-2' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
9tby0zv97y2rf WITH msgs AS ( SELECT id, JSON_OBJECT( 'msg_group' VALUE msg_array, 'msg_text' VALUE sys.dbms_advisor.format_message_group(id) ) as msg FROM ( SELECT id, JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT( 'msg_id' VALUE (fac || '-' || LPAD(TO_CHAR(message#), 5, '0')), 'seq' VALUE seq, 'p1' VALUE p1, 'p2' VALUE p2, 'p3' VALUE p3, 'p4' VALUE p4, 'p5' VALUE p5 ABSENT ON NULL) ORDER BY seq) msg_array FROM SYS.wri$_adv_message_groups WHERE task_id = :task_id GROUP BY id ) ) , pdb_stats AS ( SELECT s.con_dbid, SUM(CASE WHEN s.snap_id = :end_snap1 THEN (s.value / 1 000000) WHEN i.status = 'O' THEN 0 ELSE -(s.value / 1000000) END) as value FROM sys.awr_pdb_con_sys_time_model s, TABLE(prvt_hdm.get_cont_inst_cache(:top_cont_inst)) i WHERE s.dbid = :dbid1 AND ( s.instance_number IN (SELECT inst.instance_number FROM sys.dba_addm_instances inst WHERE inst.task_id = :task_id AND inst.status = 'ANALYZED' ) ) AND s.snap_id IN (:begin_snap1, :end_snap2) AND s.stat_name = :statname AND i.con_dbid = s.con_dbid AND i.inst_num = s.instance_number AND i.status IN ('N', 'O') GROUP BY s.con_dbid ) , final_stats AS ( SELECT s.con_dbid, p.pdb_name, p.cpus, s.value/:tp_secs1 as val_per_sec, s.value/(:tp_secs2 * p.cpus) as val_per_cpu FROM pdb_stats s, TABLE(prv t_hdm.get_cont_db_cache(:top_cont_db)) p WHERE s.con_dbid = p.con_dbid ) , top_by_value AS ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'dbid' VALUE con_dbid, 'name' VALUE pdb_name, 'cpus' VALUE cpus, 'stat' VALUE ROUND(val_per_sec, 2) ABSENT ON NULL ) ORDER BY val_per_sec DESC ) as x, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM ( SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM final_stats WHERE val_per_sec >= 0.1 AND pdb_name <> 'CDB$ROOT' ORDER BY val_per_sec DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= :top1 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM final_stats WHERE val_per_sec >= 0.1 AND pdb_name = 'CDB$ROOT' ) ) , top_per_cpu AS ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'dbid' VALUE con_dbid, 'name' VALUE pdb_name, 'cpus' VALUE cpus, 'stat' VALUE ROUND(val_per_cpu, 2) ABSENT ON NULL ) ORDER BY val_per_cpu DESC ) as x FROM ( SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM final_stats WHERE val_per_sec >= 0.1 AND pdb_name <> 'CDB$ROOT' ORDER BY val_per_cpu DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= :top2 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM final_stats WHERE val_per_sec >= 0.1 AND pdb_name = 'CDB$ROOT' ) ) SELECT JSON_OBJECT ( 'stat_type' VALUE :stattype, 'stat_spec' VALUE :statspec, 'stat_name' VALUE (SELECT m.msg FROM msgs m WHERE m.id = :statname_id), 'container_count' VALUE :containers, 'total_stat' VALUE ROUND(:total, 2), 'total_cpus' VALUE :total_cpus, 'title' VALUE (SELECT m.msg FROM msgs m WHERE m.id = :title), 'title_pc' VALUE (SELECT m.msg FROM msgs m WHERE m.id = :title_pc), 'data' VALUE top_by_value.x, 'data_pc' VALUE top_per_cpu.x ), top_by_value.cnt FROM top_by_value, top_per_cpu
9w0c53r5um1xySELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2011-4' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
9zbjgq87hy6uvselect t.ts#, t.file#, t.block#, nvl(t.bobj#, 0), nvl(t.tab#, 0), t.intcols, nvl(t.clucols, 0), t.flags, t.pctfree$, t.pctused$, t.initrans, t.maxtrans, t.rowcnt, t.blkcnt, t.empcnt, t.avgspc, t.chncnt, t.avgrln, t.analyzetime, t.samplesize, t.cols, t.property, nvl(t.degree, 1), nvl(t.instances, 1), t.avgspc_flb, t.flbcnt, t.kernelcols, nvl(t.trigflag, 0), nvl(t.spare1, 0), nvl(t.spare2, 0), t.spare4, t.spare6, ts.cachedblk, ts.cachehit, ts.logicalread, ts.im_imcu_count, ts.im_block_count, ts.im_sys_incarnation, ts.im_stat_update_time, ts.scanrate, nvl(t.acdrflags, 0), nvl(t.acdrtsobj#, 0), t.acdrdefaulttime, nvl(t.acdrrowtsintcol#, 0) from tab$ t, tab_stats$ ts where t.obj#= :1 and t.obj# = ts.obj# (+)
acmvv4fhdc9zhselect obj#, type#, ctime, mtime, stime, status, dataobj#, flags, oid$, spare1, spare2, spare3, signature, spare7, spare8, spare9, nvl(dflcollid, 16382), creappid, creverid, modappid, modverid, crepatchid, modpatchid from obj$ where owner#=:1 and name=:2 and namespace=:3 and remoteowner is null and linkname is null and subname is null
ahagwf5568kh6BEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('SalesCubeByMonth', null); END;
ajyuz252n1fu6select name, intcol#, segcol#, type#, length, nvl(precision#, 0), decode(type#, 2, nvl(scale, -127/*MAXSB1MINAL*/), 178, scale, 179, scale, 180, scale, 181, scale, 182, scale, 183, scale, 231, scale, 119, nvl(scale, 0), 127, nvl(scale, 0), 0), null$, fixedstorage, nvl(deflength, 0), default$, rowid, col#, property, nvl(charsetid, 0), nvl(charsetform, 0), spare1, spare2, nvl(spare3, 0), nvl(evaledition#, 1), nvl(unusablebefore#, 0), nvl(unusablebeginning#, 0), case when (type# in (1, 8, 9, 96, 112)) then nvl(collid, 16382) else (case when (type# in (119)) then nvl(collid, 0) else 0 end ) end case, nvl(collintcol#, 0), nvl(acdrrescol#, 0), nvl(spare7, 0), nvl(spare9, 0), nvl(spare10, 0) from col$ where obj#=:1 order by intcol#
ampw9ddqufjd3begin /*KAPI:capture*/ dbms_auto_index_internal.capture_sts; end;
aucja91nhy7d1select dbms_sqltune.report_sql_monitor_list(sql_id=>:1 , session_id=>:2 , session_serial=>:3 , active_since_sec=>:4 , inst_id=>:5 , last_refresh_time=>to_date(:6 , 'MM/DD/YYYY hh24.mi.ss'), top_n_count=> 100, max_sqltext_length=> 200, report_level=>'basic', type=>'XML') from dual
avzy19hxu6gg4SELECT VALUE(P) FROM TABLE(DBMS_SQLTUNE.SELECT_CURSOR_CACHE( BASIC_FILTER=> q'# (module is null or (module != '#' || :B1 || q'#' and module != '#' || :B2 || q'#')) and sql_text not like 'SELECT /* DS_SVC */%' and sql_text not like 'SELECT /* OPT_DYN_SAMP */%' and sql_text not like '/*AUTO_INDEX:ddl*/%' and sql_text not like '%/*+%dbms_stats%' and ( '#' || :B3 || q'#' = 'ON' or sql_text not like '/* SQL Analyze(%') and command_type not in (9, 10, 11) and plan_hash_value > 0 and ( '#' || :B4 || q'#' = 'ON' or parsing_schema_name not in (select name from sys.user$ u where bitand(u.spare1, 256) > 0 and u.type# = 1)) an d con_dbid is not null and force_matching_signature is not null and (con_dbid, force_matching_signature) not in #' || :B5 || q'# and (con_dbid, force_matching_signature, sql_id, plan_hash_value, last_exec_start_time) in #' || :B6 )) P
b1gq0fvm1j3k2INSERT INTO wrh$_sqltext (dbid, con_dbid, snap_id, per_pdb, sql_id, sql_text, command_type) SELECT :dbid, :con_dbid, :lah_snap_id, :con_id, :sql_id, :sql_text, :command_type FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM wrh$_sqltext stx WHERE stx.sql_id = :sql_id AND stx.dbid = :dbid AND stx.con_dbid = :con_dbid)
b39m8n96gxk7ccall dbms_autotask_prvt.run_autotask ( :0, :1 )
b9nbhsbx8tqz5SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_parallel_syspls_obey_force' 'false') */ SPARE4 FROM SYS.OPTSTAT_HIST_CONTROL$ WHERE SNAME = :B1
bg2v4dhy3dtc9select status, type, limit, value, numrows, creation_time, mrct_update_time from wrm$_table_quotas where dbid = :dbid and tbid = :tbid
bph8vd0ct58yzBEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('TopSalesWithinWeek', null); END;
bspu0cq5ngaysUPDATE wrh$_sqltext stx SET stx.snap_id = :lah_snap_id WHERE stx.dbid = :dbid AND stx.sql_id = :sql_id AND stx.con_dbid = :con_dbid AND stx.snap_id < :lah_snap_id
c860hqput21a4BEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('TopSalesWithinQuarter', null); END;
c9k9jwvmgucu8SELECT t.time_id, to_char(SUM(amount_sold), '9, 999, 999, 999') AS sales, to_char(AVG(SUM(amount_sold)) over(ORDER BY t.time_id range BETWEEN INTERVAL '2' DAY preceding AND INTERVAL '2' DAY following), '9, 999, 999, 999') AS centered_5_day_avg FROM sales s, times t WHERE t.calendar_month_desc IN('2023-05', '2023-06', '2023-07', '2023-08') AND s.time_id = t.time_id GROUP BY t.time_id ORDER BY t.time_id
cf7shmr0pms3qSELECT DISTINCT(USERNAME) FROM SYS.CDB_USERS WHERE CON_ID = :B2 AND USER_ID = :B1

"OLD"@"SEL$1") USE_NL(@"SEL$ 1" "OLD"@"SEL$1") FULL(@"SEL$90E42762" "X$KKSSQLSTAT"@"SEL$14") FULL(@"SEL$90E42762" "X$KGLCURSOR_CHILD_SQLIDPH"@"SEL$18") NO_ACCESS(@"SEL$90E42762" "S"@"SEL$2") LEADING(@"SEL$90E42762" "X$KKSSQLSTAT"@"SEL$14" "X$KGLCURSOR_CHILD_SQLIDPH"@"SEL$18" "S"@"SEL$2") USE_NL(@"SEL$90E42762" "X$KGLCURSOR_CHILD_SQLIDPH"@"SEL$18") USE_NL(@"SEL$90E42762" "S"@"SEL$2") INDEX_RS_ASC(@"SEL$66860544" "DEFNS"@"SEL$19" ("WRI$_SQLSET_DEFINITIONS"."ID")) INDEX_RS_ASC(@"SEL$66860544" "PLNS"@"SEL$19" ("WRI$_SQLSET_PLANS"."STMT_ID" "W RI$_SQLSET_PLANS"."PLAN_HASH_VALUE")) INDEX_RS_ASC(@"SEL$66860544" "STMTS"@"SEL$19" ("WRI$_SQLSET_STATEMENTS"."ID")) INDEX_RS_ASC(@"SEL$66860544" "STAT"@"SEL$19" ("WRI$_SQLSET_STATISTICS"."STMT_ID" "WRI$_SQLSET_STATISTICS"."PLAN_HASH_VALUE")) LEADING(@"SEL$66860544" "DEFNS"@"SEL$19" "PLNS"@"SEL$19" "STMTS"@"SEL$19" "STAT"@"SEL$19") USE_NL(@"SEL$66860544" "PLNS"@"SEL$19") USE_NL(@"SEL$66860544" "STMTS"@"SEL$19") USE_NL(@"SEL$66860544" "STAT"@"SEL$19") PUSH_SUBQ(@"SEL$470E2127") FULL(@"SEL$470E2127" "X$KZSPR"@"SEL$22") INDEX_RS_ASC(@"SEL$B01C6807" "S"@"SEL$3" ("WRI$_SQLSET_STATEMENTS"."SQLSET_ID" "WRI$_SQLSET_STATEMENTS"."SQL_ID")) INDEX_RS_ASC(@"SEL$B01C6807" "D"@"SEL$3" ("WRI$_SQLSET_DEFINITIONS"."ID")) LEADING(@"SEL$B01C6807" "S"@"SEL$3" "D"@"SEL$3") USE_NL(@"SEL$B01C6807" "D"@"SEL$3") PUSH_SUBQ(@"SEL$A731BD80") FULL(@"SEL$A731BD80" "X$KZSPR"@"SEL$8") FULL(@"SEL$5" "X$MODACT_LENGTH"@"SEL$5") FULL(@"SEL$4" "X$MODACT_LENGTH"@"SEL$4") END_OUTLINE_DATA */ /* CAPTURE SQLSET QUERY */ new.sql_seq, old.plan_hash_value, sqlset_row(new.sql_id, new.force_matching_signature, new.sql_text, new.object _list, new.bind_data, new.parsing_schema_name, new.module, new.action, new.elapsed_time, new.cpu_time, new.buffer_gets, new.disk_reads, new.direct_writes, new.rows_processed, new.fetches, new.executions, new.end_of_fetch_count, new.optimizer_cost, new.optimizer_env, new.priority, new.command_type, new.first_load_time, new.stat_period, new.active_stat_period, new.other, new.plan_hash_value, new.sql_plan, new.bind_list, new.con_dbid, new.last_exec_start_time, new.sharable_mem, new.exact_matching_signature, new.result_cache_executions, new.sql_profile, new.sql_plan_baseline, new.sql_patch, new.avg_hard_parse_time, new.user_io_wait_time, new.io_interconnect_bytes, new.parsing_user_name ) as new_row , old.plan_timestamp, old.binds_captured , new.last_load_time FROM (SELECT s.sql_seq, c.* FROM sys."_ALL_SQLSET_STATEMENTS_ONLY" s, ( SELECT /*+ first_rows(1) */ sql_id, force_matching_signature, sql_text, cast(NULL as SQL_OBJECTS) object_list, bind_data, parsing_schema_name, module, action, elapsed_time, cpu_time, buffer_gets, disk_reads, direct_writes, rows_processed, fetches, executions, end_of_fetch_count, optimizer_cost, optimizer_env, NULL priority, command_type, first_load_time, last_load_time, null stat_period, null active_stat_period, NULL other, plan_hash_value, cast(NULL as SQL_PLAN_TABLE_TYPE) sql_plan, cast (NULL as SQL_BINDS) bind_list, con_dbid , last_exec_start_time, sharable_mem, exact_matching_signature , result_cache_executions, sql_profile, sql_plan_baseline , sql_patch, avg_hard_parse_time , user_io_wait_time, io_interconnect_bytes, parsing_user_name FROM (SELECT sql_id, force_matching_signature, sql_text, parsing_schema_name, bind_data, module, action, elapsed_time, cpu_time, buffer_gets, disk_reads, direct_writes, rows_processed, fetches, executions, end_of_fetch_count, opt imizer_cost, optimizer_env, command_type, first_load_time, last_load_time, plan_hash_value, last_active_child_address, loaded_versions, con_dbid, last_exec_start_time, sharable_mem, exact_matching_signature, result_cache_executions, sql_profile, sql_plan_baseline, sql_patch, avg_hard_parse_time, user_io_wait_time, io_interconnect_bytes, parsing_user_name FROM (SELECT vst.avg_hard_parse_time, vs.sql_id, vs.force_matching_signature, vs.plan_hash_value, vs.sql_text, vs.parsing_schema_name, vs.module, vs.action, vs.elapsed_time, vs.cpu_time, vs.buffer_gets, vs.last_active_child_address, vs.first_load_time, vs.last_load_time, vs.disk_reads, vs.direct_writes, vs.rows_processed, vs.fetches, vs.executions, vs.end_of_fetch_count, vs.optimizer_cost, vs.optimizer_env, vs.command_type, vs.loaded_versions, vs.bind_da ta, vs.last_active_time, vs.con_dbid, vs.last_exec_start_time, vs.sharable_mem, vs.exact_matching_signature, vs.result_cache_executions, vs.sql_profile, vs.sql_plan_baseline, vs.sql_patch, vs.user_io_wait_time, vs.io_interconnect_bytes, vs.parsing_user_name FROM sys.v_$sqlstats vst, (SELECT sql_id, force_matching_signature, NVL(plan_hash_value, 0) plan_hash_value, sql_fulltext as sql_text, parsing_schema_name, module, action, elapsed_time, cpu_time, buffer_gets, last_active_child_address, TO_CHAR(first_load_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD/HH24:MI:SS') first_load_time, last_load_time, disk_reads, direct_writes, rows_processed, fetches, executions, end_of_fetch_count, optimizer_cost, optimizer_env, command_type, loaded_versions, bind_data, last_active_time, con_dbid, TO_CHAR(last_exec_start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD/HH24:MI :SS') last_exec_start_time, sharable_mem, exact_matching_signature, result_cache_executions, sql_profile, sql_plan_baseline, sql_patch, NULL avg_hard_parse_time, user_io_wait_time, io_interconnect_bytes, sys.dbms_sqltune_util2.user_id_to_name (parsing_user_id, con_id) as parsing_user_name FROM sys.v_$sqlarea_plan_hash s) vs WHERE vst.sql_id = vs.sql_id and vs.last_active_time >= :lat and vst.last_active_time >= :lat and vs.con_dbid = vst.con_dbid) WHERE executions > 0 AND (parsing_schema_name not in ('SYS', 'SYSTEM')) ) S ) c WHERE s.sqlset_id(+) = :stsid AND s.sql_id(+) = c.sql_id AND s.con_dbid(+) = c.con_dbid) new , sys."_ALL_SQLSET_STATISTICS_ONLY" old WHERE :stsid = old.sqlset_id(+) AND new.sql_seq = old.sql_seq(+) AND new.plan_hash_value = old.plan_hash_value(+) AND ((new.execut ions >= old.executions) OR old.sql_seq is NULL)
d3219havh1hxhSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '1999-1' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
dmrmmzj1uhmwsSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2021-1' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
dxqdy7uch79qnBEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('SalesByQuarterCountry', null); END;
f3ww8rgva3hrsupdate /* KSXM:FLUSH COL */ sys.col_usage$ set equality_preds = equality_preds + decode(bitand(:flag, 1), 0, 0, 1), equijoin_preds = equijoin_preds + decode(bitand(:flag, 2), 0, 0, 1), nonequijoin_preds = nonequijoin_preds + decode(bitand(:flag, 4), 0, 0, 1), range_preds = range_preds + decode(bitand(:flag, 8), 0, 0, 1), like_preds = like_preds + decode(bitand(:flag, 16), 0, 0, 1), null_preds = null_preds + decode(bitand(:flag, 32), 0, 0, 1), flags = flags + :flag - bitand(flags, :flag), timestamp = :time where obj# = :objn and intcol# = :coln
f7xnvp44nukp7insert into wrm$_snapshot_details (snap_id, dbid, instance_number, table_id, begin_time, end_time, step_id) values (:snap_id, :dbid, :instance_number, :bind1, :bind2, :bind3, :step_id)
fhf8upax5cxszBEGIN sys.dbms_auto_report_internal.i_save_report (:rep_ref, :snap_id, :pr_class, :rep_id, :suc); END;
ftx6f10cdm958select 'jobs_running' stat_type, count(*) v1, null v2, null v3, null v4 from ( SELECT j.job_name, j.owner, j.state FROM dba_scheduler_jobs j, dba_scheduler_running_jobs r WHERE ((j.state = 'RUNNING' OR j.state = 'CHAIN_STALLED') OR (j.state = 'SCHEDULED')) AND j.job_subname IS NULL AND r.job_subname IS NULL AND j.job_name = r.job_name(+) AND j.owner = r.owner(+) AND (j.state = 'RUNNING' OR j.state = 'CHAIN_STALLED')) UNION select 'jobs_failed', count(*) v1, null v2, null v3, null v4 from ( SELECT sj.job_name, sj.owner, sj.status FROM dba_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS sj WHERE (sj.STATUS = 'FAILED' AND ((SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(systimestamp)+0) -(((SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(sj.ACTUAL_START_DATE)+0)) + extract(day from sj.RUN_DURATION)))*24*60 < 24*60))union all select 'sysmetric', sum(case when metric_n ame = 'Average Active Sessions' then value else 0 end) v1, sum(case when metric_name = 'Session Count' then value else 0 end) v2, null v3, null v4 from gv$con_sysmetric where metric_name in ('Average Active Sessions', 'Session Count')
fy8v6kg0spv9fBEGIN dbms_application_info.set_module('SalesByWeekCountry', null); END;
g0t052az3rx44select name, intcol#, segcol#, type#, length, nvl(precision#, 0), decode(type#, 2, nvl(scale, -127/*MAXSB1MINAL*/), 178, scale, 179, scale, 180, scale, 181, scale, 182, scale, 183, scale, 231, scale, 0), null$, fixedstorage, nvl(deflength, 0), default$, rowid, col#, property, nvl(charsetid, 0), nvl(charsetform, 0), spare1, spare2, nvl(spare3, 0), nvl(evaledition#, 1), nvl(unusablebefore#, 0), nvl(unusablebeginning#, 0), case when (type# in (1, 8, 9, 96, 112)) then nvl(collid, 16382) else 0 end case, nvl(collintcol#, 0), nvl(acdrrescol#, 0), nvl(spare7, 0), nvl(spare9, 0), nvl(spare10, 0) from col$ where obj#=:1 order by intcol#
gg231amcq6y6ySELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2001-1' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
gppx8hpcwsb5gSELECT * FROM (SELECT times.calendar_quarter_desc, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, SUM(sales.amount_sold), rank() over(PARTITION BY times.calendar_quarter_desc ORDER BY SUM(amount_sold) DESC) AS rank_within_quarter FROM sales, customers, times WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND times.calendar_quarter_desc = '2012-1' AND times.time_id = sales.time_id GROUP BY customers.cust_id, customers.cust_first_name, customers.cust_last_name, customers.cust_id, times.calendar_quarter_desc) WHERE rank_within_quarter < 16
